scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd backend && npm run build" "cd frontend && npm run build"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && npm test" "cd frontend && npm test"
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules && cd backend && rimraf node_modules dist && cd ../frontend && rimraf node_modules .next
